texto: That's the Christian life: a long journey in the same direction. It's about perseverance. Obedience. And a whole lot of grace. The hand of the master winemaker, forever pruning, producing fruit, and then making something profound and lovely out of our meager harvest.
explicacao: Citação de Nicole Baart sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “That's the Christian life: a long journey in the same direction. It's about perseverance. Obedien…” articula reflexao, christian-life, christian em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como viagem e reflexao.

frase_original: That's the Christian life: a long journey in the same direction. It's about perseverance. Obedience. And a whole lot of grace. The hand of the master winemaker, forever pruning, producing fruit, and then making something profound and lovely out of our meager harvest.

texto: I wanted so much when I was young. I was an endless abyss of want, of need of desperate dreams for myself that defied logic. The promise of what was to come hung like rings around the moon on clear autumn nights; the future was unmistakeable. It was always there, glistening in the dark and suggesting that life was little more than climbing a ladder into the sky, where I could reach up with one hand and secure everything that I had ever hoped for in my grasping fingers.Oh, I dreamed.And they are not easy to give up, these dreams.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Nicole Baart: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “I wanted so much when I was young. I was an endless abyss of want, of need of desperate dreams fo…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, dreams, wanted pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao-noturna e boa-noite.
